---
title: "network-data"
output: html_document
---

```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

data_path <- "C:/Users/aderosa/OneDrive - Metropolitan Area Planning Council/Digital Equity - Program Evaluation Research/Data Collection Phase 2/Network Data/raw"

output_path <- "C:/Users/aderosa/OneDrive - Metropolitan Area Planning Council/Digital Equity - Program Evaluation Research/Data Collection Phase 2/Network Data/processed"
```

```{r, warning=FALSE}
rapidtec_test <- read_csv(file.path(data_path, "SHA-Properzi_Feb-23--2026_Feb-26--2026_comma.csv"))

write.csv(save, file.path(output_path, "SHA_toreview.csv"))
```
